summary: Commerce MCP Studio 0.1.22: reliable extension publishing and sandbox-safe connections.
highlights: Sandbox mode blocks prod and Qantas projects by default
Two-step connection wizard before entering credentials
Extension uploads no longer depend on gcloud Python

introduced: Sandbox mode setting blocks connections containing "prod" or "qantas" until disabled in settings
Two-step connection setup: name and project key first, then credentials
changed: Extension publish pipeline uses the Node GCS SDK instead of gcloud storage cp
fixed: Release no longer bumps version when only uncommitted changes exist
